# Lealia Advisory Partners

> Independent M&A advisory firm specializing in SMEs and lower mid-market transactions across the Iberian Peninsula.

Lealia Advisory Partners provides buy-side and sell-side M&A advisory, performance improvement, and corporate finance services. The firm is led by experienced Managing Partners with 30+ transactions across Europe. The website is available in English, Portuguese, and Spanish.

## Pages

- [Home (English)](/en): M&A Advisory & Strategic Consulting for Transformative Outcomes.
- [Home (Portuguese)](/pt): Assessoria M&A e Consultoria Estratégica para Resultados Transformadores.
- [Home (Spanish)](/es): Asesoramiento M&A y Consultoría Estratégica para Resultados Transformadores.
- [About (English)](/en/about): Learn about Lealia Advisory Partners — mission, values, and approach.
- [About (Portuguese)](/pt/about): Conheça a Lealia Advisory Partners — missão, valores e abordagem.
- [About (Spanish)](/es/about): Conozca Lealia Advisory Partners — misión, valores y enfoque.
- [Services (English)](/en/services): M&A buy-side & sell-side advisory, performance improvement, and corporate finance services.
- [Services (Portuguese)](/pt/services): Assessoria M&A buy-side e sell-side, melhoria de performance e corporate finance.
- [Services (Spanish)](/es/services): Asesoramiento M&A buy-side y sell-side, mejora del desempeño y corporate finance.
- [Team (English)](/en/team): Meet the Managing Partners — experienced M&A professionals.
- [Team (Portuguese)](/pt/team): Conheça os Managing Partners — profissionais experientes em M&A.
- [Team (Spanish)](/es/team): Conozca a los Managing Partners — profesionales con amplia experiencia en M&A.
- [Privacy Policy (English)](/en/privacy): How we collect, use, and protect personal information.
- [Privacy Policy (Portuguese)](/pt/privacy): Como recolhemos, utilizamos e protegemos os dados pessoais.
- [Privacy Policy (Spanish)](/es/privacy): Cómo recopilamos, utilizamos y protegemos la información personal.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap with all language variants and alternate hreflang links.
- [Robots](/robots.txt): Crawler directives allowing all major search engines and social bots.
